NEARLY TWO-DOZEN TREES WERE UPROOTED OR SNAPPED WITHIN A QUARTER MILE RADIUS OF A HOUSE NORTHWEST OF BARNARD. BASED ON PHOTOS AND AN INTERVIEW WITH THE OWNER OF THE HOUSE, IT APPEARS A WET MICROBURST WITH WIND GUSTS OF 60-70 MPH IMPACTED THE AREA.
